name: Oversized Oblong Watercolor Wood Block with Tassels Decorative Throw Pillow Camel/Light Teal - Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee
description: Add a fresh look to your sleeping space with the Oversized Oblong Watercolor Wood Block with Tassels Decorative Throw Pillow from Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee. Showcasing a mix of floral patterns in camel and light teal, this lumbar throw pillow comes accented with tassels along the corners for a beautifully decorated look. The soft fabric helps provide a comfy base for resting your head and leaning against. Simply place it with coordinating floral-print lumbar pillows to create an elegant bedroom decor.
